description: Composition Yellow round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately in warm water not more than 40 degrees Use mild detergent Do not bleach, wring Flat dry in shade For the flamboyant soccer fan, this T-shirt from puma is a must-have with its bright hue and narrow flattering silhouette. Pair it with washed jeans and soccer shoes for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'2" and shoulders 18"
